Translation.Description: Carved from the flayed skin of several Demons, these boots resonate with the telepathic screams of their unwilling providers. Yes, it's true that the raw flesh may still have the occasional spasm but don't let that deter you from sliding your feet into those two lukewarm wombs of comfortable corruption.
Translation.Provides: Demonic Ally - Summons an Assassin Demon at the same level as the caster
